name: makerjs
when_to_use: 交付物是「可进激光切割机/CNC/CAD 的图纸(DXF)」或参数化生成的切割/雕刻 SVG 时用;普通网页矢量插画直接写 SVG,文字转曲线用 opentype.js。
why_valuable: 参数化 2D 几何建模 → 导出 DXF(工程标准格式)/SVG,支持布尔运算、路径链、圆角、齿轮/箭头等参数模型、文本转路径;DXF 是工程交付格式,原生 AI 完全无法产出。

en.when_to_use: Use it when the deliverable is a drawing for a laser cutter/CNC/CAD system in DXF, or a parametrically generated cutting or engraving SVG. For ordinary web vector illustration, write SVG directly; for converting text to outlines, use opentype.js.
en.why_valuable: It provides parametric 2D geometry modeling with DXF, an engineering-standard format, or SVG export; boolean operations, path chains, fillets, parametric models such as gears and arrows, and text-to-path conversion. DXF is an engineering delivery format that native AI cannot produce.

data_in.note: Use built-in models to construct parametric models, use model for boolean operations and transforms, combine them into a model tree ({paths,models,units}), then export a string with exporter.toDXF/toSVG. The consuming AI assembles a model description that boot converts into maker objects. args depend on the model: most are numbers, while Slot uses points [x,y].

schema.units: string - 'mm' | 'inch' and similar values corresponding to makerjs.unitType.*, affecting DXF unit metadata
schema.models: Array<{ type:string, args:any[] }> - one built-in model per item; type is one of 'Rectangle'|'Oval'|'Ring'|'Star'|'Slot'|'Square'; args examples: Rectangle [width,height], Oval [width,height], Ring [outerR,innerR?], Star [numPoints,outerR,innerR?,skip?], Square [side], Slot [[x1,y1],[x2,y2],radius]

data_in.note: 用内置 models 构参数模型、model 做布尔/变换,组合出一个 model 树({paths,models,units}),再经 exporter.toDXF/toSVG 出串。消费 AI 拼的是「模型描述」,由 boot 翻成 maker 对象。args 依模型而定:多数是数字,Slot 用点 [x,y]。

schema.units: string —— 'mm' | 'inch' 等(对应 makerjs.unitType.*),影响 DXF 单位标注
schema.models: Array<{ type:string, args:any[] }> —— 每项一个内置模型;type ∈ 'Rectangle'|'Oval'|'Ring'|'Star'|'Slot'|'Square';args 如 Rectangle→[width,height]、Oval→[width,height]、Ring→[outerR,innerR?]、Star→[numPoints,outerR,innerR?,skip?]、Square→[side]、Slot→[[x1,y1],[x2,y2],radius]

provides._note: headless-primitive:纯几何 → 字符串生成;无渲染组件、无 carriers 矩阵。
provides.outputs: makerjs.exporter.toDXF(model) → string(CAD 交付,包 Blob 下载)/ makerjs.exporter.toSVG(model) → string(可 innerHTML 注入预览)。

api_surface.models: new makerjs.models.Rectangle(w,h) / Oval(w,h) / Ring(outerR,innerR?) / Star(pts,outerR,innerR?,skip?) / Slot(origin,end,radius) / Square(side)

boot.note: makerjs 是 default 导出的命名空间对象。model = { paths?, models?, units?, origin? }。toDXF/toSVG 均返回纯字符串,库零 DOM/style/event 足迹。SVG 输出内联自包含,widget 里 div.innerHTML=svg 后 shadowRoot.appendChild 即隔离。toPDF 需 pdfkit,不在此路径。

isolation.evidence: Verified vs jsDelivr makerjs@0.19.2 +esm (118KB): export{Rn as default} — boot uses default namespace import. dist/index.d.ts: exporter.toDXF(model:IModel, options?:IDXFRenderOptions):string; exporter.toSVG(model:IModel, options?:ISVGRenderOptions{fill?,stroke?,strokeWidth?,units?,useSvgPathOnly?}):string; models.Rectangle constructor(width,height); Oval(width,height); Ring(outerRadius,innerRadius?); Star(numberOfPoints,outerRadius,innerRadius?,skipPoints?); Slot(origin:IPoint,endPoint:IPoint,radius,...); Square(side); IModel={paths?,models?,units?,origin?}; unitType map present; model.combineUnion/combineSubtraction/combineIntersection(a,b) — schema/boot match. Global-footprint grep: document.head 0, document.body 0, document.createElement 0, <style/insertRule/adoptedStyleSheets 0, addEventListener 0 — pure geometry→string builder, no DOM/style/event side effects; SVG output is self-contained inline markup, so shadow injection is fully isolated.
